# HPD.ML.TimeSeries.SsaForecastingLearner

- Package: `HPD-ML-TimeSeries` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.TimeSeries`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.TimeSeries`
- Kind: `class`
- Guide: [Related documentation](../../../training/time-series/ssa-forecasting.md)

Trains an SSA model for forecasting. Identical SVD training to SsaAnomalyLearner, but returns a SsaForecaster transform.

```csharp
public sealed class SsaForecastingLearner : HPD.ML.Abstractions.ILearner
```
